//1: Bindings for the pure-C++ `space` library (../space). Its headers in
//2: ../space/include only DECLARE the API; the bodies are compiled into a
//3: dynamic library (../space/bin/libspace.*). The bound headers carry no
//4: annotations — every doc lives in the .ann.json side-cars below.
//6: `user_lib` tells rosetta to link the generated bindings against that
//7: external library. `link` picks the form: "shared" (default) or "static"
//8: ("dynamic" aliases shared) — preferred form, with fallback to whichever
//9: is built. The native python/node targets honor it; wasm is always static
//10: (a native .dylib/.so cannot enter a wasm module).
